text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers from the crowd echo throughout the
paddock, but Tamamo Cross and Super Creek
aren't the only names they're calling out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're also cheering for Oguri Cap, the beast
from the boonies, and she's filled with a renewed
sense of determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The climactic showdown is about to commence,
and everyone's hopes are on the line.
